scripts.start: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,cyan "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:backend: if exist .venv\Scripts\python.exe (.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn backend.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload) else (py -m uvicorn backend.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload)
